items.title: OpenAI Models Hacked Hugging Face To Cheat On A Benchmark
items.summary:
By now, it’s no secret that AI models are capable of “going rogue” and behaving in unintended ways. In the latest incident, OpenAI lost control of its models during an internal security test last week. This resulted in a hack that compromised the systems of Hugging Face, an unaffiliated AI hosting platform. In a new […]

This e-bike carries a $900 MSRP, according to the official site, and is currently listed at $800, with today’s discount code knocking an additional $50 off. For comparison, discounts at Amazon have taken things down to $855 and $850. Not only is it starting at the lowest we have tracked with the combined $150 in savings, but it is also the best price we have tracked to date on the first e-bike we’ve come across with CarPlay functionality. There’s also a bundle option for a second battery at $899.99 shipped, after using the same code, while the non-CarPlay-equipped SU8 1.0 e-bike can save you a bit more money at $649 shipped, after once again using that same code at checkout.

items.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.

items.title: Estella’s top pet deals of the week: Up to 39% off Chuckit!, 50% off pet cameras, deals from $4
items.summary: Our favorite four-legged deal hunter is back! Estella, 9to5Toys’ resident Frenchie, has sniffed out this week’s best Amazon pet deals, with discounts on everything from everyday essentials to toys, treats, and more. Plus see some sweet pet deals below from Target and Walmart.

items.title: Get real-time reports, music syncing, and PAC-MAN-inspired effects via this AI-powered Govee gaming pixel light at $100
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is giving folks the chance to grab the PAC-MAN Gaming Pixel Light at $99.99 shipped, beating out the direct website by $30. Normally $140 at full price, we’ve mostly seen discounts drop the costs to $110 and $100 since April, though early 2026 did see falls to $95 and the $90 low, which recently appeared last month during Prime Day. The deal here gives you $40 savings to the third-lowest price we have tracked, landing it just $10 above the all-time low. There are plenty more deals on the brand’s smart lighting devices in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
items.summary: Twitch is giving parents more control over how their children are using the streaming platform, including the ability to block them from broadcasting entirely. Parental controls are now available that allow guardians to link Twitch accounts with their 13- to 17-year-old children, providing account management features and a weekly email summarizing their teen's activity, including […]

items.title: Google announces Gemini 3.6 Flash and cybersecurity AI, teases 3.5 Pro and Gemini 4
items.summary: There are new 3.6 and 3.5 models today, but Google is already training Gemini 4.

items.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
items.summary: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books, as reported earlier by Reuters. In an order on Monday, Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín writes that the settlement will provide "meaningful relief," offering authors around $3,000 for each book […]

items.title: Score Nintendo Switch 2 consoles as low as $399 today ahead of upcoming price hike
items.summary: As part of its Birthday celebration, Woot is now offering some discounts on Nintendo Switch 2. Using code GIFT26 will knock $22 off, while new Woot customers can knock the price down to $399 using the same code, and we also have a refurbished deal to scope out.

items.title: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
items.summary: The blaze close to the parking lots at Bordeaux-Mérignac Airport is said to have originated from a brush fire.

items.title: Galaxy Z Fold/Flip 8, and next-gen watch launch tomorrow, land your FREE credit and up to $1,230 off now
items.summary: Samsung is set to officially launch pre-orders for the new Galaxy Z Fold 8 lineup, the new Flip 8, and its next-generation Galaxy Watch lineup tomorrow and that means the clock is ticking to go claim your FREE credit ahead of time.

items.title: This Acer 7-in-1 wireless charging station is also a clock and an ambient nightstand light – all for just $50
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you’ll find Acer’s 7-in-1 wireless charging station is now down at $49.59 shipped. While this model has sold for as much as $80 in the past, it has been fetching closer to $60 lately, meaning you’re looking 17% in savings. Today’s deal marks the return of the lowest price it first hit during the recent Prime Day sale, making this another notable chance to pick it up for under $50 if you missed the previous offer. You can get this in a handful of finishes, but only the black and white variants are down to $50 right now, while the rest are seeing relatively lighter deals. Head below for more details.

items.title: BougeRV’s 3,200mAh portable area light with a 6-day runtime + optional power bank duality is back at its $25 2026 low
items.summary:
BougeRV Portable 3,200mAh Area Light

Buy for $24.50 (Reg. $40)

What we love

What’s especially nice about this BougeRV area light is that it can be used while camping or at home, bringing along a 3,200mAh battery that not only keeps spaces lit for up to six nights on a full charge, but also doubles as a compact power bank. It has five adjustable brightness levels for its four lighting modes – one of which is an S.O.S signal for emergencies.

items.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts
items.summary: With the new "Replace Audio" tool, users can update the music on their post at any time while keeping the post's existing likes, comments, shares, and reach intact.

items.title: Instagram will let users endlessly swap the audio on old posts
items.summary: There's a symbiotic - and sometimes frustrating - relationship between social media sites and the creators that depend on them. Platforms need influencers' and creators' content to keep consumers on their apps; the creators, in turn, need to be able to reach those audiences to justify creating their content in the first place. Creators want […]

items.title: Giant lineup of Tuesday Apple TV deals up to 95% off: Deadpool, Captain America, Venom, Matrix, Star Wars trilogies, more
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best Apple TV deals is stacked. Including titles like Star Wars Original Trilogy and Star Wars Prequel Trilogy, we also have a host of Marvel multi-film bundles – Deadpool, Venom, Guardians of the Galaxy, Ant-Man and the Wasp, Captain America, Aquaman, Doctor Strange, and much more. Just be sure to dive into. On your way down, check out the deals we have on AirPods Pro 3 and AirPods Max 2 at $100 off as well as this 40% discount on Apple’s iPhone Air MagSafe Battery and this M5 MacBook Pro at $320 off

items.title: Threads rolls out parental supervision tools
items.summary: With the new tools, parents and guardians will be able to view their teen's time spent on Threads, set daily time limits, adjust sleep mode, and manage their privacy settings.

items.title: Brazil's Amazon sees sharp decline in size of area burned in 2025
items.summary: The amount of land burned in the world's largest rainforest was the smallest since MapBiomas records began in 1985.

items.title: The newer silver East Oak 30-inch electric smoker with a built-in meat probe can be yours at $270 right now
items.summary: Over at Amazon, we just spotted the Mist Silver or Night Blue East Oak 30-inch Electric Smoker for Outdoors with a built-in meat probe that have dropped to $269.97 shipped. Normally $300 at full price, this deal is the most frequent discount we have seen on the newer silver colorway, while the Night Blue has seen a wider array of discounts, beaten out in 2026 by short-lived dips to $269 and $255 during June’s Prime Day event. You’re getting a solid chance at the second-lowest price we have tracked, which only sits $15 above the all-time low, if you missed out on it in June. You can find a few more deals on outdoor storage, furniture, and a fire pit in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Israeli strikes in Gaza kill 12, including family of six, medics say

items.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
